summary: High‑resolution audience recording with sparkling clarity despite a few skips, capturing one of the reviewer’s favorite shows.
review: The listener praises this 24‑bit AUD capture for its deep soundstage, excellent mic separation and near‑studio clarity, noting only a handful of brief skips in the opening track. Even with those minor glitches the recording is described as “almost as clear as Sokolow’s matrix,” and the performance itself is hailed as one of the best the reviewer has ever seen.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the technical quality, with only minor skip issues, leading to a near‑perfect rating but limited data for high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: 24‑bit depth, very clear and deep sound with excellent mic spread; <10 skips in the first track, otherwise sparkling clarity comparable to a matrix mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer calls it one of the best shows they ever saw but does not mention specific songs or set structure.
